data.name: Archestratus Books + Foods
data.description: You're going to smell the food before you see the books — and that's the whole point. Archestratus is a Greenpoint institution: a cookbook and food-writing bookshop attached to a counter-service deli, where the shelves are curated with the same intelligence as the menu. Everything is deliberate here, from the selection of obscure culinary titles to the daily specials. One weakness: it's genuinely out of the way from Manhattan — but worth planning around.
